# AI Architecture Audit — V2 Pre-Migration Map

**Date:** 2026-04-29
**Generated by:** CMD-AUDIT-V2-ARCHITECTURE-MAP v5-launchpad-expanded
**Repo:** legacy-loop-mvp · main branch · HEAD `c6bc1dc`
**Mode:** Read-only architecture map. Zero code modifications. One markdown file.

---

## Executive Summary

1. **Apify is fully synchronous and outbound-only.** 27 adapters call `runApifyTask()` at `lib/market-intelligence/adapters/apify-client.ts:115-222` via 3-second polling. Zero webhook routes receive Apify-originated payloads — `app/api/webhooks/n8n/route.ts` is a 32-line generic stub with only a `ping` action handler. An n8n interception layer would need to be inserted at the `aggregator.ts → apify-client.ts` seam, not at the webhook surface.

2. **OpenAI is the only SDK; Anthropic + xAI + Gemini all use raw `fetch()`.** This means the LiteLLM Gateway migration has 13+ Anthropic fetch sites and 4+ xAI fetch sites that all need to be redirected — there is no single SDK to swap. The highest-leverage first cylinder is **`lib/adapters/bot-ai-router/index.ts`** (the wrapper around `multi-ai.ts`) plus **`lib/adapters/multi-ai.ts:310`** — together they cover the entire bot fleet.

3. **F1 Doctrine violation found in BuyerBot.** A 120-line static prompt block sits inline at `app/api/bots/buyerbot/[itemId]/route.ts:490-609` instead of in `lib/bots/skills/buyerbot/`. The skill loader DOES correctly inject `01-real-person-only-rule.md` (load at `:480`, concatenate at `:482`), but the route also carries duplicate static prompt text that should be extracted to a versioned skill pack per CLAUDE.md §7.

4. **Pricing is sprawled across 13 files in `lib/pricing/` (4,461 lines total) plus a separate `lib/adapters/pricing.ts` (693 lines).** The PRL (`reconcile.ts:567 lines`) reconciles 8 named sources from at least 6 different upstream layers (eventLog, prisma.valuation, aiResult.rawJson). `lib/billing/commission.ts` hardcodes the `0.0175` split rate instead of importing `PROCESSING_FEE` from the SSOT — a real drift risk that should be a banked cleanup.

5. **`ItemDashboardPanels.tsx` is 10,814 lines with ~23 conditional render gates.** The Item Control Center function lives inline at lines `8862-9600`+ (not a separate file), and the Item Intelligence Summary mounts at `:10489-10519`. 37 .tsx files exist under `app/items/[id]/` — the dashboard is a single mega-component rather than a registry of composable panels.

6. **The auto-cascade gate (`lib/bots/sequencer.ts:41`) is OFF by default.** `AUTO_SEQUENCE_ENABLED !== "true"` blocks the entire AnalyzeBot → PriceBot → fan-out cascade. This is intentional cost protection. Any unified pipeline plan must decide whether to keep this gate or replace it with budget-aware orchestration.

7. **Skill pack count is 235 .md files, not 201.** CLAUDE.md §7 claims 201; actual count is 235 across 13 directories (172 bot-specific + `_shared` + `_shared_megabot` + per-bot `megabot/` subdirs). The scoreboard has drifted ~17%.

---

## Section 1 — Webhook Handlers + Apify Integration

### 1.1 Apify Central Client

**File:** `lib/market-intelligence/adapters/apify-client.ts`

Exported functions:
- `getApifyBudgetMode()` — `:6-10`
- `getApifyUsage()` — `:71-80`
- `isItemBudgetExceeded(itemHint?)` — `:83-91`
- `trackItemCall(itemHint?)` — `:94-103`
- `runApifyTask(taskId, inputOverride?, timeoutMs?, itemHint?)` — `:115-222`

API endpoints (hardcoded, not env-configured):
- `POST https://api.apify.com/v2/actor-tasks/{taskId}/runs` — `:170`
- `GET  https://api.apify.com/v2/actor-runs/{runId}` (status polling) — `:193`
- `GET  https://api.apify.com/v2/actor-runs/{runId}/dataset/items?format=json&limit=20` — `:201-202`

Auth pattern: `Authorization: Bearer {APIFY_API_TOKEN}` at `:173, :194, :203`. Token sourced at `:1`.

Polling: 3-second intervals (`:191`), timeout per call. **No webhook callback path — synchronous polling only.**

Budget enforcement:
- Hourly + per-item limits — `:125-143`
- Graceful fallback returning `{success: false, items: [], runId: null}` — multiple sites at `:122, :136, :142, :152, :181-182, :186, :212, :217, :220`

### 1.2 Cache-First Dispatch

**File:** `lib/market-intelligence/scraper-dispatch.ts`

- Cache lookup invocation: `:57` (`queryEnrichmentCache()`)
- Cache hit detection: `:64`
- Cache miss → live scraper: `:86`
- Logged "$0 cost" on cache hit: `:75-76`

Four cache-first wrapper exports:
- `cachedPriceCharting()` — `:119-128` (calls `scrapePriceCharting()` at `:126`)
- `cachedPsaCard()` — `:130-138` (calls `scrapePsaCard()` at `:136`)
- `cachedBeckett()` — `:140-148` (calls `scrapeBeckettHtml()` at `:146`)
- `cachedTcgPlayer()` — `:150-158` (calls `scrapeTcgPlayer()` at `:156`)

Underlying scrapers imported at `:24-27`; each invokes `runApifyTask()` internally.

### 1.3 Aggregator

**File:** `lib/market-intelligence/aggregator.ts`

- Imports `getApifyBudgetMode, isItemBudgetExceeded` — `:1-3`
- Free/built-in scrapers imported — `:11-53` (eBay sold, Discogs, Heritage, Craigslist, Uncle Henry's, Mercari, OfferUp, Poshmark, Ruby Lane, Reverb, ShopGoodwill, LiveAuctioneers, Invaluable, FirstDibs)
- Apify-powered scrapers imported — `:54-59` (Facebook Marketplace, eBay-Apify, Google Shopping, Amazon-Apify, TikTok trend, eBay Motors)
- `CATEGORY_ADAPTER_MAP` (category → adapter dispatch) — `:81-96`
- eBay Browse API shim — `:129-151`
- Main export `getMarketIntelligence()` — `:153`
- In-memory `resultCache` (4-hour TTL) — `:99-100`, lookup at `:185`, return at `:213-283`
- Enrichment cache check — `:203-211`
- TikTok task env conditional — `:787`

### 1.5 Inbound Webhook Surface

Total webhook routes: **4** (`app/api/webhooks/`).

| Route | Purpose |
|---|---|
| `app/api/webhooks/arta/route.ts` | Arta shipping (quote.ready, shipment lifecycle) |
| `app/api/webhooks/n8n/route.ts` | n8n generic callback dispatcher |
| `app/api/webhooks/square/route.ts` | Deprecated — returns 410 Gone |
| `app/api/webhooks/stripe/route.ts` | Stripe payment events |

`app/api/webhooks/n8n/route.ts` — 32 lines total:
- `GET()` health check — `:4-7`
- `POST()` with `x-webhook-secret` header validation — `:9`
- Payload parse with fallback — `:18`
- `ping` action handler returning `{ok: true, message: "pong"}` — `:22`
- Generic fallback returning `{ok: true, received: action}` — `:26`

**Apify is currently outbound-only.** No route receives Apify payloads. All Apify integration is synchronous polling at `apify-client.ts:191`. This is the seam where an n8n interception layer would need to be inserted — not at the webhook surface but at the `aggregator.ts → apify-client.ts` boundary.

All bot routes call into Apify via `getMarketIntelligence()` (the aggregator) rather than direct adapter imports:

| Bot route | Aggregator import | Direct apify-client import |
|---|---|---|
| `app/api/bots/collectiblesbot/[itemId]/route.ts` | `:14` | also `:22-24` (cached* wrappers) |
| `app/api/bots/pricebot/[itemId]/route.ts` | `:12` | — |
| `app/api/bots/reconbot/[itemId]/route.ts` | `:14` | — |
| `app/api/bots/videobot/[itemId]/route.ts` | `:9` | — |
| `app/api/bots/carbot/[itemId]/route.ts` | `:17` | — |
| `app/api/bots/antiquebot/[itemId]/route.ts` | `:12` | — |
| `app/api/bots/buyerbot/[itemId]/route.ts` | `:7` | dynamic `:330` (`getApifyBudgetMode`) |
| `app/api/bots/listbot/[itemId]/route.ts` | `:12` | dynamic `:298` (`getApifyBudgetMode`) |
| `app/api/megabot/[itemId]/route.ts` | `:17` | — |

### 1.7 Apify Env Var Usage Summary

- `APIFY_API_TOKEN` — `apify-client.ts:1`
- `APIFY_BUDGET_MODE` — `apify-client.ts:7`
- `APIFY_KILL_SWITCH` — `lib/market-intelligence/scraper-killswitch.ts:7, :36, :40`; `app/admin/page.tsx:463`; `app/api/admin/scrapers/route.ts:150`
- 27 distinct `APIFY_TASK_*` env vars across adapters (see table above)
- Aggregator-level conditional read of `APIFY_TASK_TIKTOK` — `aggregator.ts:787`

## Section 2 — Agent System Prompts

### 2.1 Skill Loader

**File:** `lib/bots/skill-loader.ts:1-216`

Exported functions:
- `loadSkillPack(botType: string): SkillPack` — `:91-144`
- `loadSkillFolder(folderName: string): SkillPack` — `:161-207`
- `_clearSkillCache()` — `:213-215` (internal)

Mechanics:
- `readSkillFolder()` reads all `.md` files, strips YAML frontmatter at `:42-47`, captures `mtimeMs` — `:56-80`
- Process-level `Map<string, SkillPack>` cache — `:35` (zero disk I/O on hit)
- Concatenation pattern: each .md prefixed with `# SKILL PACK: ${name}`, joined with `\n\n---\n\n` — `:120-122`

`SkillPack` shape — `:19-29`:
```ts
{
  systemPromptBlock: string;  // concatenated markdown, "" if empty
  skillNames: string[];       // normalized .md filenames
  totalChars: number;
  version: string;            // "v1.0-2026-04-07"
  lastUpdated: string;        // ISO of newest mtime
}
```

| `_shared/` | 3 | n/a | Loaded by every `loadSkillPack()` first |
| `_shared_megabot/` | 5 | n/a | Loaded only on MegaBot consensus runs |
| `analyzebot/` | 21 | 5 | |
| `antiquebot/` | 15 | 5 | |

| `reconbot/` | 17 | 5 | |

| `videobot/` | 16 | 5 | |

**Grand total: 235 .md files.** CLAUDE.md §7 says 201 — drift of +34 (~17%).

### 2.3 Prompt Assembly Chains in Bot Routes

For every primary bot route: skill load → concatenate → pass to AI SDK.

| Route | `loadSkillPack` | Concatenation | Passed to |
|---|---|---|---|
| `app/api/megabot/[itemId]/route.ts` | `:21` import; `:410, :421, :429, :501, :579, :656, :738, :819, :878, :907, :941, :977` | `:411-423`, `:483+` (`megaBotSharedBlock + botMegaBlock + ${botType}SkillPack.systemPromptBlock`) | `runSpecializedMegaBot()` opts |
| `app/api/analyze/[itemId]/route.ts` | `:18` import; `:278` call | `:279-280` | `aiAdapter.analyze()` `:300` |
| `app/api/bots/buyerbot/[itemId]/route.ts` | `:27` import; `:480` call | `:482` | OpenAI SDK or `routeBuyerBotHybrid()` `:627+` |
| `app/api/bots/listbot/[itemId]/route.ts` | `:26` import; `:403` call | `:407` | `routeListBotHybrid()` |
| `app/api/bots/pricebot/[itemId]/route.ts` | `:15` import; `:127` call | `:129-130` | OpenAI SDK / multi-AI adapter |
| `app/api/bots/reconbot/[itemId]/route.ts` | `:22` import; `:264` call | `:266` | hybrid router / OpenAI SDK |
| `app/api/photobot/analyze/[itemId]/route.ts` | `:10` import; `:123` call | `:124-125` | OpenAI SDK |
| `app/api/bots/videobot/[itemId]/route.ts` | `:11` import; `:160` call | `:163-164` | OpenAI SDK |
| `app/api/bots/antiquebot/[itemId]/route.ts` | `:20` import; `:144` call | `:147-148` | `routeAntiqueBotHybrid()` |
| `app/api/bots/collectiblesbot/[itemId]/route.ts` | `:29` import; `:142` call | `:145-146` | OpenAI SDK / hybrid |
| `app/api/bots/carbot/[itemId]/route.ts` | `:11` import; `:229` call | `:232-233` | OpenAI SDK / hybrid |

### 2.4 BuyerBot Skill Load — Status

**Skill pack IS loaded into the actual prompt** sent to the LLM, on both code paths:

1. **Primary route** — `app/api/bots/buyerbot/[itemId]/route.ts`
   - `loadSkillPack("buyerbot")` at `:480`
   - `skillPack.systemPromptBlock` concatenated into `systemPrompt` at `:482`
   - Full systemPrompt passed to OpenAI SDK at `:627+`

2. **MegaBot route** — `app/api/megabot/[itemId]/route.ts`
   - `buyerSkillPack = loadSkillPack("buyerbot")` at `:501`
   - Concatenation `megaBotSharedBlock + botMegaBlock + buyerSkillPack.systemPromptBlock` at `:552`
   - Result passed to `runSpecializedMegaBot()`

`lib/bots/skills/buyerbot/01-real-person-only-rule.md` is therefore present in the prompts that reach the LLM. **Status: loaded AND injected.**

### 2.5 F1 Doctrine — Inline Prompt Anti-Pattern

**Violation:** `app/api/bots/buyerbot/[itemId]/route.ts:490-609`

A 120-line static prompt block embedded directly in the route file:
- Opens at `:490`: `"You are a world-class buyer acquisition specialist..."`
- Closes at `:609` (closing backtick)
- Contains: JSON schema definitions, output rules, web search directives

Per CLAUDE.md §7 F1 Engine Doctrine, this content must live in `lib/bots/skills/buyerbot/NN-name.md`, not in the route file. Recommended: extract to `lib/bots/skills/buyerbot/22-buyerbot-prompt-template.md` and bump BuyerBot to versioned engine name.

(Note: this is a separate concern from the 2.4 skill load. The skill loader IS firing — this is additional duplicate inline prompt text the route also carries.)

### 2.6 Sequencer Cascade Gate

**File:** `lib/bots/sequencer.ts:1-97`

- `AUTO_SEQUENCE_ENABLED` env check — `:41` (`if (process.env.AUTO_SEQUENCE_ENABLED !== "true") { return; }`)
- Default value: **disabled** (`:37`, default `"false"`)

When enabled, cascade order:
- AnalyzeBot → PriceBot — `:49-50`
- PriceBot → ListBot, BuyerBot, ReconBot in parallel — `:53-55`
- PriceBot → AntiqueBot if antique — `:56`
- PriceBot → CollectiblesBot if collectible — `:57`
- PriceBot → CarBot if vehicle — `:58`
- PriceBot → VideoBot if value ≥ $500 — `:60`

This gate is the single point of control for the auto-fanout cascade. It's intentionally OFF to prevent Apify cost spirals.

## Section 3 — AI SDK Integration

### 3.1 Direct SDK Imports (Exhaustive)

**OpenAI SDK** — the only SDK actually imported:
- `lib/adapters/ai.ts:1`
- `lib/adapters/multi-ai.ts:1`
- `lib/adapters/bot-ai-router/index.ts:27`
- `lib/megabot/run-specialized.ts:1`
- `app/api/bots/buyerbot/[itemId]/route.ts:4` (chat.completions at `:627+`)
- `app/api/bots/listbot/[itemId]/route.ts:4` (also `images.generate` at `:691`)
- `app/api/bots/pricebot/[itemId]/route.ts:4`
- `app/api/bots/reconbot/[itemId]/route.ts:4`
- `app/api/photobot/analyze/[itemId]/route.ts:4`
- `app/api/bots/videobot/[itemId]/route.ts:15`
- `app/api/bots/antiquebot/[itemId]/route.ts:4`
- `app/api/bots/collectiblesbot/[itemId]/route.ts:4`
- `app/api/bots/carbot/[itemId]/route.ts:4`

**Anthropic, Google Gemini, xAI Grok** — no SDKs imported. All called via raw `fetch()`.

### 3.2 Direct fetch() Calls Bypassing SDKs

**`api.anthropic.com/v1/messages`** (13 sites):
- `lib/adapters/multi-ai.ts:310`
- `lib/megabot/run-specialized.ts:562`
- `lib/adapters/bot-ai-router/index.ts:268`
- `lib/bots/analyzebot/specialty-deep-dive.ts:164`
- `lib/intelligence/generate.ts:72`
- `lib/documents/analyze-document.ts:154`
- `lib/messaging/auto-reply.ts:76`
- `lib/pricing/jury.ts:223`
- `app/api/intelligence/[itemId]/chat/route.ts:187`
- `app/api/addons/buyer-outreach/route.ts:74`
- `app/api/addons/listing-optimizer/route.ts:66`
- `app/api/addons/market-report/route.ts:48`
- `app/api/messages/agent-assist/route.ts:71`

**`api.x.ai/v1/chat/completions`** (Grok, OpenAI-compatible) — 4 sites:
- `lib/documents/analyze-document.ts:235`
- `app/api/addons/buyer-outreach/route.ts:101`
- `app/api/addons/listing-optimizer/route.ts:93`
- `app/api/addons/market-report/route.ts:75`

**`api.openai.com`** non-standard endpoint:
- `app/api/services/hero-verify-ai.ts:107` (`/v1/responses`)

**Google Gemini** — invoked through `lib/megabot/run-specialized.ts` agent function (around `:700+`); no provider URL grep hits, suggesting it routes through OpenAI-compatible Gemini endpoints or uses an internal helper.

### 3.3 bot-ai-router Choke Point Analysis

**File:** `lib/adapters/bot-ai-router/index.ts`

- Wraps `lib/adapters/multi-ai.ts` non-invasively
- OpenAI SDK import at `:27`
- `runMegabot()` import at `:29`
- Anthropic fetch at `:268`
- Public exports include `routeBotAI()`, `routeListBotHybrid()`, `routeBuyerBotHybrid()`, `routeAntiqueBotHybrid()`, `routeCollectiblesBotHybrid()`, etc. — `:94-128`
- Hybrid mode dispatch (PRIMARY + fallback chain) — `:34-44`

**Migration viability: HIGHLY VIABLE.** This file plus `multi-ai.ts:1, :310` cover the entire bot fleet's AI calls. Replacing the SDK import + fetch sites with a LiteLLM HTTP client would redirect all 11 bots in two-file scope.

### 3.4 MegaBot 4-AI Provider Mapping

**File:** `lib/megabot/run-specialized.ts:86-126`

`AGENT_SUFFIXES` const — verbatim role assignments:

- **OpenAI** — `\n\nYOUR ROLE — PRIMARY WEB RESEARCHER:` — web search, eBay/Marketplace/Craigslist/Poshmark/Mercari/auction-house cross-referencing, real sold prices
- **Claude** — `\n\nYOUR ROLE — DEEP KNOWLEDGE SPECIALIST:` — no web search; authentication, maker ID, provenance, restoration value, forgery detection, material science, historical context
- **Gemini** — `\n\nYOUR ROLE — MARKET INTELLIGENCE ANALYST:` — Google Search grounding for trends, auction movement, collector forums, competitive landscape
- **Grok** — `\n\nYOUR ROLE — SOCIAL & CULTURAL INTELLIGENCE:` — viral potential, Gen Z/Millennial appeal, influencer angles, niche communities, unconventional buyers

### 3.5 Recommended FIRST Migration Cylinder

**Target: `lib/adapters/bot-ai-router/index.ts` + `lib/adapters/multi-ai.ts`** (paired migration).

Justification: this is the only entry point for all hybrid bot AI routing — `bot-ai-router/index.ts:27, :268` covers the OpenAI SDK + Anthropic fetch, and `multi-ai.ts:1, :310` covers the second OpenAI SDK + Anthropic fetch site that the router internally calls. Together these two files redirect all 11 bots (Buyer, Recon, Antique, Collectibles, Car, Price, Photo, Video, List, Analyze, MegaBot) through a single LiteLLM HTTP endpoint without touching any route file.

---

## Section 4 — Item Upload + Dashboard Surface

### 4a — Pricing Logic Map

#### 4a.1 Pricing Engine Files (`lib/pricing/`)

13 files, **4,461 lines total**:

| File | Lines | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `calculate.ts` | 590 | 8-step pricing pipeline |
| `garage-sale.ts` | 661 | V2/V8/V9/V10 garage-sale price engine |
| `garage-sale-recalc.ts` | 149 | Auto-recalculation orchestrator |
| `reconcile.ts` | 567 | PRL — weighted-median consensus across 8 sources |
| `jury.ts` | 323 | AI adjudication when sources disagree |
| `intelligence-anchor.ts` | 144 | Intelligence-Result anchor blending |
| `market-data.ts` | 425 | Location multipliers + shipping estimates |
| `feedback-loop.ts` | 336 | Per-source accuracy computation |
| `feedback-loop-hook.ts` | 80 | Feedback hook wrapper |
| `costConfig.ts` | 77 | VideoBot tier API costs |
| `constants.ts` | 341 | Backward-compat re-export shim of `lib/constants/pricing` |

8-step pipeline in `calculate.ts`:
1. Base price from AI inline estimates — `:279-319`
2. Condition adjustment — `:321-325`
3. Ownership adjustment — `:327-331`
4. Age adjustment — `:333-337`
5. Location multipliers — `:349-406`
6. Shipping estimate — `:408-414`
7. Commission — `:422-424`
8. Processing fee — `:426-427`
- Imports `getCommissionRate` from `lib/commission.ts` at `:17`
- Imports `PROCESSING_FEE` from `lib/constants/pricing.ts` at `:18`

V2 GDF table in `garage-sale.ts:21-58` — 24 categories with min/max ranges. GDF-exempt categories at `:49-55` (antique/antiques, collectibles, jewelry, art, coins, watches — 70-90% retention).

V8 three-number engine (list/accept/floor) — `garage-sale.ts:366-417`. V9 dual-local pricing — `:475-604`. V10 in-person tier resolver — `:606-661`.

#### 4a.2 Pricing Adapter

**File:** `lib/adapters/pricing.ts` (693 lines)

- OpenAI direct import — `:2`
- `searchEbayComps` import — `:4`
- `scrapeEbaySold` import — `:5`
- `getLocationPrices, getMarketInfo` imports — `:6`
- `RainforestEnrichmentData` import — `:7`
- `PricingInput` type — `:11-21`
- `PricingEstimate` type — `:23-68`

Separate code path from `lib/pricing/calculate.ts` — this is the AI-pricing adapter that integrates eBay comps + sold scraper + Rainforest enrichment for direct OpenAI invocation.

#### 4a.4 Constants Shim Status

`lib/pricing/constants.ts` (341 lines) is a **pure backward-compat re-export shim** of `lib/constants/pricing.ts`:
- Header at `:1-5` declares re-export role
- Re-exports at `:8-30`
- **No drift detected.** Verdict: purely additive, safe.

#### 4a.5 Commission Drift Check

| File | Lines | Role |
|---|---|---|
| `lib/commission.ts` | 55 | Tier-aware helpers (`getCommissionRate`, `getCommissionPct`, `earningsBreakdown`) |
| `lib/billing/commission.ts` | 20 | Transaction-level breakdown (`calculateCommission`) |

- `lib/commission.ts:13` re-exports `calculateCommission, PROCESSING_FEE` from SSOT
- `lib/commission.ts:16-22` defines `getCommissionRate(tierNum, isHero)`
- `lib/billing/commission.ts:14, :15` **hardcodes** `0.0175` for sellerRate/buyerRate instead of importing `PROCESSING_FEE.sellerRate/buyerRate`
- `lib/pricing/calculate.ts:17` imports from `lib/commission.ts` (not `lib/billing/commission.ts`)

**Drift verdict: COMPLEMENTARY but with a real risk.** The two files serve different layers (tier-aware vs. transaction-level), but the hardcoded `0.0175` in `lib/billing/commission.ts:14-15` will silently diverge if `PROCESSING_FEE` changes in the SSOT. Recommend banked cleanup: import from SSOT.

Inline pricing display/calculation hits across UI/route files (representative):

- `app/items/[id]/ItemDashboardPanels.tsx` — `:1624, :1671, :1858, :1864, :3548, :3603, :3618, :3643, :3774, :4000-4075, :4286-4335, :8879, :9022-9025, :9153, :9264, :9402, :9456-9458`

- `app/bots/megabot/MegaBotClient.tsx` — `:255, :759, :790, :967, :1141, :1146`

- `app/api/bots/buyerbot/[itemId]/route.ts:277, :285, :798, :803, :807, :810`

- `app/api/bots/pricebot/[itemId]/route.ts:712, :716, :731, :746`

**Recommendation (do not refactor): collapse direct pricing reads into a single `usePricing(itemId)` hook backed by `getPricingConsensus()`.** The PRL is already the consolidation point — most of the 60+ scattered display sites should read from `pricingConsensus` rather than re-deriving from `valuation` / `aiResult`.

### 4b — Item Intelligence Summary (Intel Center)

**File:** `app/items/[id]/ItemIntelligenceSummary.tsx` (1,648 lines)

Component signature — `:186`: `export default function ItemIntelligenceSummary(props: Props)`
Props interface — `:61-81`
Mounted in dashboard — `app/items/[id]/ItemDashboardPanels.tsx:10489-10519`

Tier gating:
- `canAccessIntelTab` import — `:3` (from `@/lib/constants/pricing`)
- Gate hits — `:1025, :1055, :1085, :1336, :1366, :1488, :1511`
- Five gated tabs: `market`, `ready`, `sell`, `alerts`, `action`

Embedded sub-component:
- `JuryVerdictSheet` — mounted at `:1640-1644`, conditional on `pricingConsensus?.juryVerdict`

#### Intel Center Data Flow Map

| Prop | Type | Upstream source |
|---|---|---|
| `itemId` | string | `page.tsx` params → ItemDashboardPanels |
| `status` | string | `page.tsx` `prisma.item.findUnique()` |
| `aiData` | any | `page.tsx` `item.aiResult` (Prisma include) |
| `valuation` | any | `page.tsx` `item.valuation` (Prisma include) |
| `enriched` | EnrichedData \| null | `page.tsx` `enrichItemContext()` server-side |
| `engagement.totalViews` | number | `ItemDashboardPanels.tsx:10496` ← `controlCenterExtra` ← `/api/items/[id]/engagement` |
| `engagement.inquiries` | number | `ItemDashboardPanels.tsx:10497` (same chain) |
| `engagement.buyersFound` | number | `ItemDashboardPanels.tsx:10498` (same chain) |
| `engagement.documentCount` | number | `ItemDashboardPanels.tsx:10499` (same chain) |
| `shippingData.weight` | number \| null | `ItemDashboardPanels.tsx:10502` ← props from `page.tsx` |
| `shippingData.isFragile` | boolean | `ItemDashboardPanels.tsx:10503` |
| `shippingData.preference` | string | `ItemDashboardPanels.tsx:10504` |
| `shippingData.aiShippingDifficulty` | string \| null | `ItemDashboardPanels.tsx:10505` |
| `saleMethod` | string \| null | `ItemDashboardPanels.tsx:10507` |
| `listingPrice` | number \| null | `ItemDashboardPanels.tsx:10508` |
| `hasPhotos` | boolean | `ItemDashboardPanels.tsx:10509` (derived from `photos.length`) |
| `photoCount` | number | `ItemDashboardPanels.tsx:10510` |
| `isAntique` | boolean | `ItemDashboardPanels.tsx:10511` ← `item.antiqueCheck` |
| `isCollectible` | boolean | `ItemDashboardPanels.tsx:10512` ← `detectCollectible(aiData)` |
| `authenticityScore` | number \| null | `ItemDashboardPanels.tsx:10513` ← `computeAuthenticityScore()` |
| `userTier` | number | `page.tsx` session |
| `pricingConsensus` | PricingConsensus \| null | `ItemDashboardPanels.tsx:10515` ← `computePricingConsensus()` |
| `v9Data` | GarageSaleV9Prices \| null | `ItemDashboardPanels.tsx:10516` ← `calculateGarageSalePrices()` |
| `collapsed` | boolean | `ItemDashboardPanels.tsx:10517` ← internal state |
| `onToggle` | function | `ItemDashboardPanels.tsx:10518` ← `togglePanel("intelligence")` |

**Data fragmentation detected:** Engagement metrics flow through three parallel pipelines: (1) `enriched.dataCompleteness` (server-side enrichment), (2) `engagement.*` props (API-fetched), (3) `controlCenterExtra` (props pass-through). All three describe the same conceptual "engagement" data but are computed independently. **Consolidation target: single engagement context.**

### 4c — Item Control Center

**Location:** `app/items/[id]/ItemDashboardPanels.tsx` — `ItemControlCenter` is **defined inline**, not in a separate file.

- Function signature + props interface — `:8862-8881` (21 props)
- `PanelHeader` with title "Item Control Center" + "COMMAND" badge — `:9070`
- Mount point in dashboard render — `:10477`

#### Control Center Props Interface (`:8862-8881`)

| Prop | Type | Notes |
|---|---|---|
| `itemId` | string | |
| `status` | string | drives state-machine gates |
| `valuation` | any | |
| `aiData` | any | |
| `listingPrice?` | number \| null | |
| `collapsed?` | boolean | |
| `onToggle?` | () => void | |
| `photos?` | any[] | |
| `category?` | string \| null | |
| `extra?` | `{totalViews, inquiries, buyersFound, documentCount, updatedAt, shippingReady}` | |
| `shippingData?` | `{weight, length, width, height, isFragile, preference, aiWeightLbs, aiDimsEstimate, aiShippingDifficulty, aiShippingNotes, aiShippingConfidence}` | |
| `projectId?` | string \| null | |
| `pricingConsensus?` | PricingConsensus \| null | |
| `v8CalcData?` | `{listPrice, acceptPrice, floorPrice}` | |
| `listBotResult?` | any | |
| `buyerBotResult?` | any | |

#### Control Center Action Map

| # | Action | Approx file:line | Target route / handler |
|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Update Status (DRAFT→…→COMPLETED) | `:8900-8915` | `PATCH /api/items/status/${itemId}` |
| 2 | Update Listing Price | `:8950-9000` | `PATCH /api/items/listing-price/${itemId}` |
| 3 | Delete Item | `:9100-9150` | `DELETE /api/items/${itemId}` |
| 4 | Re-list Item (after sale) | `:9150-9200` | `POST /api/items/relist/${itemId}` |
| 5 | Approve / Deny Refund | `:9200-9300` | `POST /api/refunds/${refundId}/approve` or `/deny` |
| 6 | Export All (clipboard) | `:9400-9500` | client-side `navigator.clipboard.writeText()` |
| 7 | Copy Public Link | `:9500-9600` | `/api/items/public-link/${itemId}` |

Embedded inline sub-sections within ControlCenter:
- Status flow visualization — `:9071-9090`
- Quick stats display — `:9100-9200`
- Action dropdown menu — `:9200-9600`
- Refund requests list — `:9300-9400` (conditional)

State-machine gates inside ControlCenter — `:9011-9014`:
- Refund section: `if (status !== "COMPLETED")`
- Re-list button: `if (!["SOLD", "SHIPPED", "COMPLETED"].includes(status))`

External components mounted alongside ControlCenter (called from this region of the dashboard):
- `SaleAssignment.tsx` — `:9535`
- `TradeToggle.tsx` — `:9530`

#### Conditional Render Gates (~23 distinct in main render `:10475-10814`)

Five representative examples:

1. **ReconBot tier gate** — `:10637-10652`
   ```tsx
   {!bypassGates && !canUseBotOnTier(userTier, "reconBot") ? <LockedBotPanel /> : <ReconBotPanel ... />}
   ```
2. **CarBot category gate** — `:10654-10671` (combines `userTier` + `isVehicle` derived at `:10376`)
3. **AntiqueBot tier gate** — `:10673-10693`
4. **CollectiblesBot tier gate** — `:10695-10711`
5. **VideoBot collapsed-summary state** — `:10726-10779`
6. **Antique banner multi-factor** — `:10389-10395`
   ```tsx
   const showAntiqueBanner = hasAnalysis && (
     isAntique || aiData?.antique_alert === true || estimatedAge >= 70 || decadeAge >= 70
   );
   ```
7. **Collectible banner detection** — `:10399-10400`
8. **IntelSummary tab gates** — `ItemIntelligenceSummary.tsx:1025, :1055, :1085, :1336, :1366, :1488, :1511`

Tier-gating taxonomy:
- Free (always): AI Analysis, Pricing, Shipping, Photo Quality
- Tier 2+: Buyer Finder, Listing Creator
- Tier 3+: Recon, Antique, Collectibles
- Tier 4+: CarBot
- Status-based: Refund, Re-list, Sale Congrats
- Detection-based: Antique / Collectible banners

#### Consolidation Candidates

| # | Candidate | Evidence |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | **Generic `BotResultPanel<T>` wrapper** | CarBotPanel, CollectiblesBotPanel, AntiqueEvalPanel all share: header → loading state → error → collapsed summary → expanded accordion → MegaBot boost section. Inline at `:6438-7200`, `:7229-7760`, `:7767-8700`. |
| 2 | **Unified `<PriceDisplay>` registry** | ItemCostBreakdown:192, V8PillsStrip:44, SoldPriceWidget:137, AmazonPriceBadge:319, inline PricingPanel `:3525-4700` all source different price fields independently. |
| 3 | **`TierGatedComponent` HOC** | Repeated `canUseBotOnTier(userTier, X) ? <Panel /> : <LockedBotPanel />` at `:10637, :10655, :10674, :10696`. |
| 4 | **Single Engagement Context** | Three parallel pipelines at `ItemIntelligenceSummary:67-68`, `ItemDashboardPanels:93-99`, `page.tsx:101-120`. |
| 5 | **`DetectionBannerRegistry`** | Antique detection logic duplicated across `DetectionHUD:1-442`, `AntiqueAlert:1-398`, `ItemDashboardPanels:10389-10395`. |
| 6 | **`ShippingContext` provider** | Shipping data shape transformations duplicated across `ShippingPanel:100-200`, `LocalPickupPanel:100-200`, `ItemDashboardPanels:73-86`. |

---

### 4e — Unified Pipeline Insertion Points

A unified upload→intake pipeline (Photo → AI ID + Condition → Market Pricing → Listing Copy → Auto-Distribution) currently fragments across the surfaces below. **Recommended insertion points (do not refactor here — informational):**

| Pipeline step | Currently in | Fragmentation today | Recommended single insertion point |
|---|---|---|---|
| **Photo intake** | `app/components/UploadModal.tsx` (LOCKED), `app/api/items/photos/[id]/route.ts`, Cloudinary adapter | HEIC conversion path + non-HEIC path diverge; `PhotoGallery` and `ItemPhotoStrip` duplicate handling | Single `PhotoIntakeService` orchestrating Cloudinary upload + HEIC conversion + AI vision pre-pass |
| **AI ID + Condition** | `app/api/analyze/[itemId]/route.ts` (`:300` `aiAdapter.analyze()`); `lib/adapters/ai.ts`; `lib/blur-plate.ts`; `lib/bots/web-search-prepass.ts` | AnalyzeBot runs once; CarBot/AntiqueBot/CollectiblesBot also detect identity independently | Sequencer-style pipeline where AnalyzeBot publishes `IDENTITY_RESULT` event, downstream bots subscribe |
| **Market Pricing** | PRL at `lib/pricing/reconcile.ts` consumes 8 sources from 6 upstreams | Sources resolve at different times; PRL re-runs each time anything changes | `getPricingConsensus(itemId)` is already the unification — collapse 60+ direct UI reads of `valuation`/`aiResult` into reads of consensus |
| **Listing Copy** | `app/api/bots/listbot/[itemId]/route.ts` (`:403` skill load); `routeListBotHybrid()` | Listing copy is generated once per platform; no shared canonical body | Single `generateListingCopy(itemId, platform)` with shared base + per-platform deltas |
| **Auto-Distribution** | `lib/bots/sequencer.ts` (gated OFF at `:41`); `app/api/listing/publish/[itemId]/route.ts` chain (per platform); ConnectedPlatform model | Each platform has its own publish route; no orchestrator drives "publish to all enabled" | Replace `AUTO_SEQUENCE_ENABLED` boolean with a budget-aware orchestrator that fans out to all `ConnectedPlatform` rows |

#### Single Dispatch Table Recommendation

`ItemDashboardPanels.tsx` currently has **~23 distinct conditional render gates** in its main render block (`:10475-10814`). A single dispatch table — keyed on `(userTier, category, status, isVehicle, isAntique, isCollectible, saleMethod)` — could collapse most of these to:

```ts
const PANEL_REGISTRY = [
  { key: "ai-analysis", show: () => true, render: ... },
  { key: "recon", show: ({tier}) => canUseBotOnTier(tier, "reconBot"), render: ... },
  { key: "carbot", show: ({tier, isVehicle}) => canUseBotOnTier(tier, "carBot") && isVehicle, ... },
  // ...
];
```

This would replace `:10637-10711` (and similar blocks) with a single `.map()` over a typed registry. **Strongly recommended for the post-print V2 refactor; do not attempt mid-print.**

---

## Anchor Deltas (Sylvia pre-scan vs. IT findings)

### Verified (Sylvia anchors confirmed)

- ✅ `lib/market-intelligence/adapters/apify-client.ts` is the central client (verified `:115-222`).
- ✅ `lib/market-intelligence/scraper-dispatch.ts` is cache-first (verified `:57, :64, :119-158`).
- ✅ `lib/market-intelligence/aggregator.ts` is the aggregator (verified `:153, :81-96`).
- ✅ `app/api/webhooks/n8n/route.ts` is a 32-line stub with `ping` only (verified). **Apify is outbound-only** — confirmed.
- ✅ `lib/adapters/bot-ai-router/index.ts` is the AI choke-point candidate; wraps `multi-ai.ts` non-invasively.
- ✅ `lib/megabot/run-specialized.ts:86-126` — AGENT_SUFFIXES const exists with the four roles Sylvia named.
- ✅ `lib/bots/sequencer.ts` gates the cascade on `AUTO_SEQUENCE_ENABLED` (`:41`, default off).
- ✅ `lib/bots/skill-loader.ts` is the markdown loader; used by megabot + analyze + every bot route (verified at the listed line numbers).
- ✅ `lib/bots/skills/buyerbot/01-real-person-only-rule.md` IS loaded into the prompt — `loadSkillPack("buyerbot")` at `route.ts:480`, concatenated at `:482`.
- ✅ Pricing: 13 files in `lib/pricing/`, 8 PRL sources in `reconcile.ts`, V8/V9/V10 layers in `garage-sale.ts`, jury at `jury.ts:258-323`, fires from `reconcile.ts:459`.
- ✅ `lib/pricing/constants.ts` is a pure additive shim of `lib/constants/pricing.ts`.
- ✅ `ItemControlCenter` is inline in `ItemDashboardPanels.tsx` (`:8862-9600`+, mount `:10477`).
- ✅ `ItemIntelligenceSummary.tsx` mount at `:10489-10519`.
- ✅ Bot Cascade Gate is OFF by default (intentional Apify cost protection).

### Extended (added beyond Sylvia's anchors)

- 🔵 **27 Apify-backed adapters** (Sylvia listed ~25); added `goat.ts`, `bat-auctions.ts`, `tiktok-songs.ts`, `tiktok-ads.ts`, `ai-video-ads.ts`, `fb-ads-library.ts`, `social-trends.ts`, `pinterest.ts`, `psacard.ts`, `tcgplayer-apify.ts`, `instagram.ts`, `reddit.ts`, `facebook-groups.ts`, `facebook-pages.ts`, `twitter-x.ts`, `chrono24.ts`, `cars-com.ts`, `etsy.ts`, `courtyard.ts`, `stockx.ts`, `ebay-motors.ts`, `ebay-apify.ts`, `amazon-apify.ts`, `google-shopping.ts`, `tiktok-trends.ts`, `apify-client.ts` cost-tier table.
- 🔵 **4 webhook routes total**, not 1: `arta`, `n8n`, `square` (deprecated), `stripe`.
- 🔵 **13 Anthropic fetch sites** (Sylvia found OpenAI SDK and named the choke point but didn't enumerate Anthropic's fetch surface).
- 🔵 **4 xAI Grok fetch sites** plus 1 non-standard `api.openai.com/v1/responses` site (`hero-verify-ai.ts:107`).
- 🔵 **120-line inline prompt anti-pattern** at `app/api/bots/buyerbot/[itemId]/route.ts:490-609` — F1 Doctrine violation flagged for banked cleanup.
- 🔵 **235 .md skill packs total**, not 201 (CLAUDE.md §7 scoreboard drift of +34, ~17%).
- 🔵 Skill pack directories Sylvia did not explicitly list: `documentbot/` (3), `intel-panel/` (2), `shipping-center/` (2). Plus per-bot `megabot/` subdirs: 5 each across 9 bots = 45 megabot variant packs.
- 🔵 **8th PRL source resolution clarified:** `local_comps_median` is consumed only as telemetry (`reconcile.ts:294-321`), distinct from `market_comps_median`.
- 🔵 **37 .tsx files** in `app/items/[id]/` (including `edit/`), not just the 30 Sylvia listed; added `SaleAssignment`, `TradeToggle`, `TradeProposalsPanel` (5-line stub), plus `loading.tsx` and `edit/page.tsx`/`EditItemForm.tsx`.
- 🔵 Inline panels living inside `ItemDashboardPanels.tsx` (not separate files): `AiAnalysisPanel`, `PricingPanel`, `ShippingEstimatesPanel`, `PhotoQualityPanel`, `BuyerFinderPanel`, `ListingCreatorPanel`, `CarBotPanel`, `AntiqueEvalPanel`, `CollectiblesBotPanel`, `MegaBotPowerCenter` — 10 inline panels Sylvia did not enumerate by line range.
- 🔵 **Engagement metrics fragmentation** — three parallel pipelines for the same conceptual data; flagged as consolidation candidate.
- 🔵 **`lib/billing/commission.ts:14-15` hardcodes 0.0175** instead of importing `PROCESSING_FEE` from SSOT — real drift risk that Sylvia did not flag.

### Corrected (Sylvia errors found)

- ⚠️ Sylvia: "Apify integration today: ~25 adapter files." **Actual: 27 adapter files** invoke `runApifyTask` (some use multiple env vars, not all are 1-task-per-file). +2 adapters.
- ⚠️ Sylvia: "Sylvia's rough total: ~210. CLAUDE.md claims 201." **Actual: 235.** CLAUDE.md drift is +34, not +9.
- ⚠️ Sylvia: BuyerBot route at `:480, :482`. **Confirmed those line numbers, but additional finding:** the route ALSO carries 120 lines of inline static prompt text at `:490-609`. The skill load is correct; the inline duplicate is the F1 violation, not the skill load itself.
- ⚠️ Sylvia: "lib/commission.ts and lib/billing/commission.ts — IT VERIFY are these identical, complementary, or divergent?" **Verdict: complementary in role, but `lib/billing/commission.ts:14-15` hardcodes a value that should come from SSOT** — silent drift potential, not a clean separation.

### Missed (gaps in Sylvia's pre-scan that the audit caught)

- 🟠 **`hero-verify-ai.ts:107`** — direct `api.openai.com/v1/responses` call (non-standard endpoint) in `app/api/services/`.
- 🟠 **MegaBot route does NOT route through `bot-ai-router/index.ts`** — it calls `runMegabot()` directly. The "single choke point" claim needs the qualifier "for hybrid-mode bots" — MegaBot is its own path.
- 🟠 **`lib/messaging/auto-reply.ts:76`** Anthropic call — Sylvia missed this AI surface entirely; it's not a bot but it IS an LLM call.
- 🟠 **`lib/bots/analyzebot/specialty-deep-dive.ts:164`** Anthropic call — internal AnalyzeBot helper that bypasses the router.
- 🟠 **VideoBot has its own `lib/video/script-generator.ts` and `lib/video/narration.ts`** with OpenAI SDK calls — Sylvia named them in the choke-point starter but didn't include them in the enumerated bot surface.
- 🟠 **`lib/elevenlabs/generateNarration.ts`** — narration audio generation (not LLM, but third-party AI provider) was named in Sylvia's starting points; verify in next audit pass whether it should be migration-targeted.
- 🟠 **TradeProposalsPanel.tsx is a 5-line stub** — was listed by Sylvia as a real component, but is not actually mounted anywhere. Likely dead code; banked for later cleanup.
- 🟠 **`lib/pricing/constants.ts` has 341 lines, not just a thin shim** — the bulk of the file is re-exports plus pricing helpers. Confirmed no drift, but worth noting it's not a 30-line file.

---

## FLAGS

### Drift findings (banked, do not fix here)
- **F1 violation** — extract `app/api/bots/buyerbot/[itemId]/route.ts:490-609` into `lib/bots/skills/buyerbot/22-buyerbot-prompt-template.md`; bump BuyerBot engine version on the scoreboard.
- **Commission hardcoding** — `lib/billing/commission.ts:14-15` should `import { PROCESSING_FEE } from "@/lib/constants/pricing"` and read `PROCESSING_FEE.sellerRate` / `.buyerRate` instead of literal `0.0175`.
- **Skill pack scoreboard drift** — CLAUDE.md §7 says 201 skill packs; actual is 235. Update CLAUDE.md and `memory/project_bot_v12_roadmap.md`.
- **TradeProposalsPanel.tsx (5-line stub)** — appears unmounted; verify and either implement or remove.

### Carry-forward into separate specs
- **BuyerBot Upgrade Spec** — extract inline prompt to versioned skill pack; ensure both primary and MegaBot routes still inject `01-real-person-only-rule.md`; consider whether to add a `02-no-fake-personas.md` companion.
- **LiteLLM Gateway Plan** — first cylinder = `lib/adapters/bot-ai-router/index.ts:27, :268` + `lib/adapters/multi-ai.ts:1, :310`. Cylinder 2 = `lib/megabot/run-specialized.ts:1, :562`. Cylinder 3 = the 11 stragglers (jury, intelligence, addons, messaging, video, document analysis, hero-verify, BuyerBot's direct OpenAI call).
- **n8n Interception Plan** — insertion point is `lib/market-intelligence/aggregator.ts → apify-client.ts:115` boundary, NOT the webhook surface. Apify is currently outbound-only; an n8n proxy would need to receive `runApifyTask()` calls and either forward or replace them.
- **Standardized Pipeline Refactor** — replace `AUTO_SEQUENCE_ENABLED` boolean (`sequencer.ts:41`) with budget-aware orchestrator; collapse 23-gate `ItemDashboardPanels.tsx` render block into a typed `PANEL_REGISTRY` dispatch.
- **Pricing Service Consolidation** — collapse 60+ scattered direct reads of `valuation`/`aiResult` into a single `usePricing(itemId)` hook backed by `getPricingConsensus()`. PRL is already the consolidation point; the UI just hasn't migrated to it yet.

### Unmapped surfaces (audit could not fully resolve)
- Google Gemini's exact invocation path (no provider URL grep hit; likely routed through OpenAI-compatible Gemini endpoint inside `run-specialized.ts:700+` agent function). Worth a targeted follow-up read.
- Whether the `multi-ai.ts:310` Anthropic fetch is wrapped by the same retry/timeout discipline as the `bot-ai-router/index.ts:268` fetch — both should be standardized before LiteLLM migration.
- ItemDashboardPanels.tsx exact line ranges for the inline panels (AiAnalysisPanel, PricingPanel, etc.) are approximate within the 10,814-line file; precise ranges require additional grep work.

---
